acc_events.name: College Night(Girls Preparatory School)
acc_events.notes:
Event Details:

Time: Check-in & set-up is 5:30pm-6:45pm; Dinner (optional) at 5:45pm-6:30pm; Fair: 6:45pm-8:15pm

Location: Girls Preparatory School, 205 Island Avenue, Chattanooga TN 37405

Event Space: Gym, Athletic Commons, and Frierson Theater Lobby

Parking: Park in the lot at the top of the hill where your navigation will lead you if you put 205 Island Avenue as your destination. You will be directed by signage and security staff upon arrival.

acc_events.name: Tri-Cities College Fair
acc_events.notes:
10+ High Schools
Science Hill, University High, Greeneville, Dobyns Bennett, DB Excel, Unicoi,
Cloudland, Happy Valley, Hampton, Unaka, Morristown East, Cosby, Cocke County
6:00pm-8:00pm. – Open to Public
This will be a great opportunity for your college or university to share admissions
requirements, scholarships, academic programs, campus life, and more with prospective
students and families.
More information and registration links to come later this summer.
Location
Freedom Hall Civic Center
1320 Pactolas Road, Johnson City, TN 37604
